Isn't it an excuse to have fun and compete? /Summer is a time of rest and miracles. How nice is just to sit on the river bank with your best friends! However, everything is not so simple in our story./No child likes to live by the rules: clean up after themselves, learn, do homework in time... It's much more interesting to go on a fun adventure with new friends

When he leaves the iron on whilst he goes out to fix Dilys' washing machine, a fire starts./Bronwyn takes Sarah and James to the wishing well to make wishes, but nobody notices Lion the cat get stuck in the well and soon he needs to be rescued./Bronwyn takes Sarah and Nipper the dog out on a walk along the cliffs to tire out Nipper, but trouble strikes when Sarah falls on a rock and hurts her leg./While looking for Lion the cat, Mandy Flood knocks over a firework and starts a fire in Mike's workshop

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.sub-title: [Series] No Trespassing!/Hide and seek is not for the weak/Watch Out!/Little Cousin/Get Well Soon!/Recipe for disaster/... (S1)
programme.desc: The Bear patiently waits to collect the harvest of carrots. And so does the hungry hare./Masha wants to play hide and seek. But the Bear has other plans in mind. Knowing that it is impossible to go against her wishes, he agrees to play with her. /The Bear wakes up a bump on his head and a biathlon cup but can't remember what happened. Masha and the hare tell their stories and The Bear has to decide which one is true. /The Bear's cousin Panda comes over to visit. Masha immediately wants to spend time playing games. But a competitive spirit arises as they can't share anything./Tired from Masha's endless games, the Bear pretends to be sick so she will leave him alone. But the caring girl is determined to cure her friend./The Bear cooks some porridge for Masha, but she doesnt like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge herself. But soon the porridge swells out. /The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard. Soon finds himself cleaning and sewing new dresses for Masha after having to pull her from a puddle and a jar of jam. /The bear finds a beautiful black piano in the forest. Masha decides to become a world famous pianist, she asks the Bear to teach her how to play the piano./The Circus Tiger visits his old friend Bear and is bewildered by Masha's behaviour. He tries everything to get rid of her, until he gets lost in the forest and Masha saves him

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.sub-title: [Series] Just Shoot Me/Kidding Around/Two Much/Sabre-Toothed Bear (S2)
programme.desc: With kindness and comedy in its heart, this series follows the adventures of a little girl Masha and her friend, The Bear

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] When Fools Rush In/Pontypandy Extreme/Danger by the Double/Elvis Sings the Blues/Towering Inferno (S6)
programme.desc: James wants to get Bronwyn something special for her birthday and borrows Station Officer Steele's metal detector to find ancient coins, but he gets trapped near the cliffs./Norman is upset when Trevor runs over his skateboard. Not prepared to wait for a new board, Norman decides to retrieve coins from the bottom of a wishing well and buy one himself./James and Sarah will not stop competing. When a fire starts in the forest they are too busy trying to out do each other to realize they are in danger./Fireman Elvis Cridlington breaks his leg dancing around the Fire Station and begins to wonder if he is really cut out to be a fireman./Norman Price, Mandy Flood and the twins play hide and seek, but Norman tries to hide in the fire tower while the firefighters are running a drill. Fireman Sam comes to the rescue

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.sub-title: [Series] Cranky at the End of the Line/New Crane On the Dock/Unscheduled Stops/Philip's Number/The Fastest Red Engine on Sodor/... (S21)
programme.desc: Cranky is starting to creak and Salty teases him about his age, joking that Cranky is destined for The Scrap Yard./Carly is the new crane at Brendam Docks and she is awake early and keen to start working./Thomas and Bertie are racing one day, when Bertie has a breakdown./Gordon teases Philip about the number 68 that he has painted on his side, suggesting its because Philip has broken down 68 times since he came to Sodor./One day James comes racing into Knapford and screeches to a stop. Thomas warns him to be careful./One day while James is speeding along his brakes fail and he crashes into Tidmouth Sheds causing serious damage

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.sub-title: [Series] God Save the Queen/All the World's a Stage/Around the World in One Day/Who am I?/How they met/Don't wake till spring!/... (S3)
programme.desc: Masha dreams of royal life. Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? /The best remedy for boredom is a good game. And a good play is even better. That is exactly what our friends decided. It's just not so easy to agree on what kind of play to stage../The Bear is preparing to go on a world trip, but a last minute accident makes him panic. /Who to be when you grow up? Finding the answer to this question is one of the most difficult processes for each child. Masha is no exception./When faced with the strenuous task of getting rid of this enthusiastic girl to whom he finds in his house one day, Bear soon begins to worry about her safety in the woods./Bears barricades his home for the winter, but must deal with Masha and her awakening of the bees. However, when the Bear cooks some porridge he discovers her fallen asleep. /The Bear adores New Years Eve so much that he wakes up just to celebrate this holiday

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] The One That Got Away/Norman's Halloween Heist/Ice Hockey Meltdown/Dinosaur Hunt/Charlie's Big Catch/Float Your Boat (S6)
programme.desc: Norman Price goes fishing with Charlie, Sarah and James. They discover a baby whale heading for the beach and try to stop it, but land themselves into trouble./Norman Price causes havoc on Halloween, when he tries to collect more sweets than the other children./It's freezing and Mike Flood is building an ice rink in his back garden. The kids are going to play ice hockey on it - except Norman can't skate, and so is forced to use an aid./Norman Price and Trevor Evans discover an ammonite on the beach which inspires Norman to create the illusion of real dinosaurs for James and Sarah./Charlie takes the schoolchildren on a fishing trip and catches the biggest shoal of fish ever./Charlie is having a day at the beach with James and Sarah. But today is not Charlies day. It seems that everything he does turns in to a disaster and makes him look uncool

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] Pontypandy Pioneers/Rocky Rescue/Cadet Catastrophe/Twitching the Night Away/Pest in Show/Monster Mania (S7)
programme.desc: With Fireman Sam out on an emergency, Trevor Evans leads some young explorers on a nature walk to the Mountain Rescue Centre, but is he up to it?/Pontypandy is holding a contest for its Most Talented Pet. Mandy and Sarah engage in a rivalry over whether Nipper or Lion will win. /Ellie takes the Junior Cadets into the woods for a training day, but when a small mishap causes a canister explosion, Fireman Sam must get things under control./Norman and Trevor go bird watching. Elvis is preparing to go on a TV show and says he might not be a fireman for much longer./While trying to park Venus, Penny and Elvis accidentally end up breaking the pole in the fire station. Can Mike replace the pole in time? /Norman films a glimpse of the Pontypandyness Monster using Joe Sparkes Submaster 2000, sparking Monster Mania in Pontypandy!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.sub-title: [Series] Unscheduled Stops/Philip's Number/The Fastest Red Engine on Sodor/A Shed for Edward/Cranky at the End of the Line/... (S21)

programme.desc: The Pontypandy Giant Vegetable Competition is disrupted when the giant pumpkin James is transporting on Go Karts rolls down a hill and straight into the vegetable stands! /Mrs Chen's class make sky lanterns for Chinese New Year, but until Norman Price creates a disaster when he lets go of his too early./Everyone goes to the beach for a picnic but Lily needs help when she gets stranded on a sandbank./When Tom and Moose volunteer to help Mandy and Norman spot a fox, the animal scampers off with Moose's hat and Tom and Moose end up stuck in a fox hole./Charlie is so busy correcting Gareth's haphazard preparations for the firework display that he misses a Catherine wheel nailed too tightly to the door of Bessie's shed

programme.desc: With lots of action, excitement and adventures, watch Fireman Sam and his team tackle tricky mountain rescues as they battle to rescue the residents of Pontypandy

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] Pontypandy In The Park/Day at the Seaside/Model Plane/Three Legged Race/Norman's Ark (S10)
programme.desc: The residents of Pontypandy have gathered in Pontypandy Park for the annual town festival. The fire fighters are well represented with Sam giving the kids rides on Jupiter./It is Station Officer Steele's day off from the Fire Service. Elvis persuades Sam to let him be in charge at the fire station. /James has a new model airplane which Norman has a go at but flies it into Station Officer Steele who demands that he not fly it in Pontypandy./In the annual three-legged race in Pontypandy, Fireman Sam is partnered with a less-than-confident Dilys Price. Norman Price tries to cheat but then hurts his leg./The residents of Pontypandy wake up to find the whole of the town flooded! Fireman Sam and Tom Thomas the helicopter pilot lend a hand where they can

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] Dog Day Disaster/Big Top Norman/Paddle On/Day Of The Penguin/Bus Trouble (S10)
programme.desc: Norman wants a dog so is looking after Auntie Phyllis dog to prove what a good owner he can be. But the dog wont do anything that Norman asks.../Norman is loudly trumpeting his latest venture - a big top circus in the park, which he promises will be the greatest show on earth. But Normans circus begins badly.../Ben and Hannah are on an ocean paddle expedition together to the Northern Buoy and back. A long distance paddle like this is a first for Hannah and Ben promises to keep her safe./When a penguin escapes from Newtown Zoo Elvis really hopes he will see it. But its Norman and Mandy who meet the penguin first, waddling across the beach!/Mrs Chen is taking a school trip to the ruins, but when Trevor turns up the bus is not running well. Mrs Chen insists that they set off before he can check under the bonnet

programme.sub-title: [Series] Pizza Pandemonium/The Break-Up/To Outfox a Fox/Blow Me Down/Castles In The Air (S10)

programme.desc: It is open day at Pontypandy Fire Station and everyone is invited to visit and have a look around. Norman and James end up stuck on the roof when they want to see more./Mike has built a rocket and is preparing to launch it. Norman has become fascinated by Mike's project and wants to build and launch one of his own./Sam and the crew arrive at Lizzies Vet Surgery to find that Woolly is stuck on the roof! Meanwhile the Pioneers are off with Trevor, trying to get their map-reading badges./Its Sams birthday and Charlie has got Joe to make Sam a remote control model of Jupiter. Unfortunately, Hannah and Sarah decide to play with it and accidentally break it! /When Norman, James, Sarah and Mandy go to play Castles and Kings at the ruins, Gareth builds them a cardboard dragon to use in their game. programme.desc: Station Officer Steele gets out his kite and pretends it's his nephew's. When he tries to fly it at the Flood's house, it gets stuck on the roof./It's the day of Pontypandy's new Ocean Rescue Centre launch and Station Officer Steele is taking the firefighters on a tour of the centre./Norman Man & Atomic Boy are quick to test out their new-found powers when Joes robotic dog goes on the rampage, causing Sams dream of a fire free month to goes up in flames. /Norman is upset when Trevor runs over his skateboard. Not prepared to wait for a new board, Norman decides to retrieve coins from the bottom of a wishing well and buy one himself./As twins Sarah and James can never agree on what kind of birthday party to have, Bronwyn has decided that this year they will have two parties./Ellie takes the Junior Cadets into the woods for a training day, but when a small mishap causes a canister explosion, Fireman Sam must get things under control

Mandy and Sarah engage in a rivalry over whether Nipper or Lion will win. /While trying to park Venus, Penny and Elvis accidentally end up breaking the pole in the fire station. Can Mike replace the pole in time? /Trevor takes the girls of Pontypandy to Newtown to see a One Way Street concert. But when the bus skids off the road, Mandy still wants to keep going and gets into danger

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] Cry Wolf/Sheep on the Road/Mam's Day/Alarm on the Beach/Hot Air/Towering Inferno (S6)
programme.desc: Norman accidentally sets off Dilys' new fire alarm, so she confiscates his football. To get it back, he sets the alarm off again, and again when a fox enters the shop./Woolly is sent to stay with Norman, who is ill, whilst Mike mends her field's gate. Unfortunately, Norman and Woolly go out, resulting in Trevor's bus swerving off the road./It's Mother's Day, but Norman only wants to go skateboarding. He makes Dilys a very unsafe candle holder and when she takes it to the Whole Fish Cafe, a fire starts./When James and Mandy find a crate on the beach, they try to open it, but end up trapping James' legs under the crate./It's a very hot day in Pontypandy and Trevor Evans refuses to accept that his old bus may not make it up the mountain. When the engine overheats, Trevor ignores Norman's advice./Norman Price, Mandy Flood and the twins play hide and seek, but Norman tries to hide in the fire tower while the firefighters are running a drill. Fireman Sam comes to the rescue

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] Off Duty Sam/Sheepdog Trials/Norman's Ghost/Poorly Penny/Pirates of Pontypandy/Pontypandy Pioneers (S7)
programme.desc: Mandy Flood and Norman Price head off to the beach with their buckets and nets challenging each other to see who will obtain the best catch of the day./Norman Price practices his new career as a shepherd by rounding up Woolly with Radar. However, Woolly and her lamb run into the road and make Mike Flood's van tip over./Everyone in Pontypandy is looking forward to the Halloween party at the Floods' house. Norman Price gets into the Halloween spirit by pretending Pontypandy is haunted by a ghost./On Fireman Sam's day off the crew are inundated with the Jones' emergencies. Firefighter Penny Morris has caught a cold, but she still tries to perform her firefighter duties./James and Norman get trapped in a row boat at sea when their pirating adventures get a little out of hand./With Fireman Sam out on an emergency, Trevor Evans leads some young explorers on a nature walk to the Mountain Rescue Centre, but is he up to it?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.sub-title: [Series] Not Now, Charlie/The Thomas Way/The Phantom Express/Frozen Turntable/Percy's Lucky Day/No Snow For Thomas (S1)
programme.desc: Charlie is the small purple engine who likes to tell jokes. One day Charlie discovers an elephant on the line and tries to alert the other engines, but they all think he is joking./When Harold the helicopter breaks down near Callan Castle, Duck and Thomas are sent to take him to the Sodor Search and Rescue for repair./One night James tries to scare Percy by telling him that theres a ghost at Ulfstead Castle./One cold evening the steam engines return to Tidmouth sheds and discover the turntable is frozen stuck, meaning only one berth is accessible./After a couple of mishaps involving a torn sack of mail and some cargo on the line, Percy begins to feel like he has too much bad luck./Emily is sent out to clear the tracks on a snowy day; When she has so much fun that Thomas wants to join in, he cannot find his snow plough

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.sub-title: [Series] Little Cousin/Recipe for disaster/Laundry day/The Grand Piano Lesson/Stripes and whiskers/Home alone/Hold Your Breath/... (S1)
programme.desc: The Bear's cousin Panda comes over to visit. Masha immediately wants to spend time playing games. But a competitive spirit arises as they can't share anything./The Bear cooks some porridge for Masha, but she doesnt like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge herself. But soon the porridge swells out. /The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard. Soon finds himself cleaning and sewing new dresses for Masha after having to pull her from a puddle and a jar of jam. /The bear finds a beautiful black piano in the forest. Masha decides to become a world famous pianist, she asks the Bear to teach her how to play the piano./The Circus Tiger visits his old friend Bear and is bewildered by Masha's behaviour. He tries everything to get rid of her, until he gets lost in the forest and Masha saves him./Masha finds a magical hat that grants gifts to all the forest dwellers./Masha has the hiccups! The Bear tries remedies from a medical encyclopaedia to stop the hiccups. In the end they spread to the other forest inhabitants./Masha finds an egg, from which a penguin hatches. Bear decides the penguin will only be happy in suitable weather conditions and sends him to Antarctica./Panda, the Bears distant relative pays one more visit to the Bear. They start making Chinese dumplings, but then Masha appears, with her own methods of cooking

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] Cry Wolf/King of the Mountain/Big Top Norman/Sheep on the Road/Lighthouse Lock Out/Paddle On (S6)
programme.desc: Norman accidentally sets off Dilys' new fire alarm, so she confiscates his football. To get it back, he sets the alarm off again, and again when a fox enters the shop./Tom and Moose take the Pontypandy Pioneers on a mountain climbing expedition./Norman is loudly trumpeting his latest venture - a big top circus in the park, which he promises will be the greatest show on earth. But Normans circus begins badly.../Woolly is sent to stay with Norman, who is ill, whilst Mike mends her field's gate. Unfortunately, Norman and Woolly go out, resulting in Trevor's bus swerving off the road./Norman spoils everyone's trip to the lighthouse by locking them all out on the balcony in a bid to avoid cleaning Mike's muddy van, which he ruined./Ben and Hannah are on an ocean paddle expedition together to the Northern Buoy and back. A long distance paddle like this is a first for Hannah and Ben promises to keep her safe

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] Fireman James/Stage Fright/The Why Files/Dilys's Big Surprise/Garden Force/Pontypandy Slickers (S7)
programme.desc: James is keen to be a firefighter and listens to calls to Jupiter on his walkie-talkie. After one call he gets to Norman and Lion first and helps rescue them./It's a snowy day in Pontypandy when Moose announces he is opening his 'Winter Wonderland'. Norman, Sarah and James are very excited. /Norman & Hannah set themselves up as The Why Files - investigators of the mysterious mysteries of Pontypandy & one of their first cases involves strange goings on near the cliffs. /Norman Price tries to make his Mum's birthday special by making a cake with Mike Flood, but they end up causing a fire. Fireman Sam comes to the rescue./It's snowy and Norman is directing his very first movie up in the mountains. Sam and Elvis are also up in the mountains, on their way to a skiing lesson with Penny./Norman, Mandy, Sarah and James are participating in Mooses Wild West Experience. Sam and Penny rescue Mandy and her horse after they fall down a slope and get tangled in bushes

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.sub-title: [Series] Picture Perfect/Time to Ride My Pony/One-Hit Wonder/Growing Potion/Swept Away/All in the Family/... (S2)
programme.desc: On a fine winter day Masha and the Bear find inspiration to start painting. Masha borrows paints with a tiny canvas and begins to make paintings of everyone in the forest./The Bear's good friend, the Tiger, is back for a visit and they decide to spend the time together in an intellectual way - playing chess. /Masha decides to help the Bear to win the heart of his beloved Female Bear. To do so, Masha organizes her own rock band with the forest creatures and shoots a music video./While inspecting his garden, the Bear notices that his tulips are not doing well. The Bear is fed and decides to make the ultimate growing potion. /Masha and the Hare are having an epic game of hockey. When Masha goes off to find a missing puck and stumbles upon a broom, she gets an idea./Once upon a time the Penguin boy visits the Bear. He tries to entertain him and involve him in various activities but the Penguin spends most of the time playing with Masha./Masha transforms the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory, but Masha gets a toothache. There is a lesson for all children who love sweets - take very good care of your teeth!/While the Bear is busy mending Masha's pretty dresses, she finds an old camera in his closet. She takes a photo and discovers that she has a talent for photography./On a fine day Masha decides to show some care and attention towards her favourite Pig. As always, her attempts turn out to be catastrophic for everyone around her

Fireman Sam assures him that the filing will be done and tells him that he should relax and enjoy himself./When Bronwyn decides she needs to record some relaxing whale song, Charlie offers to take her out on the skiff to find a whale. /When Bronwyn decides she needs to record some relaxing whalesong, Charlie offers to take her out on the skiff to find a whale./When Joe and Mike discover that Norman is entering Pontypandy's big go-kart race, The Pontypandy Cup, they get very nostalgic about the go-karts they made when they were kids./The Pontypandy Pioneers are working towards their construction badges and what better way to do it than to build a treehouse under the supervision of Mike Flood!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] Model Plane/Three Legged Race/Norman's Ark/Open Day/Mike's Rocket/Sticky Situation (S7)
programme.desc: James has a new model airplane which Norman has a go at but flies it into Station Officer Steele who demands that he not fly it in Pontypandy./In the annual three-legged race in Pontypandy, Fireman Sam is partnered with a less-than-confident Dilys Price. Norman Price tries to cheat but then hurts his leg./The residents of Pontypandy wake up to find the whole of the town flooded! Fireman Sam and Tom Thomas the helicopter pilot lend a hand where they can./It is open day at Pontypandy Fire Station and everyone is invited to visit and have a look around. Norman and James end up stuck on the roof when they want to see more./Mike has built a rocket and is preparing to launch it. Norman has become fascinated by Mike's project and wants to build and launch one of his own./Norman Price doesn't follow the directions on his model airplane kit and ends up stuck to his bedroom door during a fire. Fireman Sam comes to the rescue

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.sub-title: [Series] Other Side of the Mountain/No Help At All/Goodbye Sir Topham Hatt/Wild Water Rescue/Thomas The Babysitter/Rocky Rescue (S19)
programme.desc: Thomas wants to see the other side of the mountain and gets his chance when he comes flying off the rails./Bill and Ben are fed up with Timothy so they trick the Fat Controller into sending Timothy to help at Brendam Docks./Percy overhears some workmen talking and concludes that the Fat Controller is leaving the railway, much to the shock of the other engines./Percy is to take the Mayor to the Sodor Search and Rescue Centre to celebrate their one-thousandth rescue, but jealous Diesel wants the job and sends Percy to an old quarry./Thomas, Annie and Clarabel have to deal with a noisy baby. /When Rocky derails, the Sodor Search and Rescue Team have to work together to rescue him

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.sub-title: [Series] La Dolce Vita/Just Shoot Me/Kidding Around/Two Much/Bon Voyage/Trading Places Day/The Thriller Night/Terrible power/Hats off (S2)
programme.desc: Masha transforms the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory, but Masha gets a toothache. There is a lesson for all children who love sweets - take very good care of your teeth!/While the Bear is busy mending Masha's pretty dresses, she finds an old camera in his closet. She takes a photo and discovers that she has a talent for photography./On a fine day Masha decides to show some care and attention towards her favourite Pig. As always, her attempts turn out to be catastrophic for everyone around her. /Masha's sister Dasha decides to visit her. Even though they look very much alike, they are so different! Masha takes Dahsa to the Bear's house./What does it take to turn a regular journey into a great trip? One Bear, one travelling bag and... One Masha. However, they are not meant to travel very far together... /The Bear recalls his past accomplishments in circus and recreates some of his signature tricks on a unicycle. Unfortunately, he trips and falls on his head. /The Bear would have never allowed Masha to be left alone watching a spooky film. But he failed to predict the amount of trouble that a scared child can put him through. /The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon./The Bear is struggling against a greedy moth in his house. Trying to save his magic box, he puts it on the porch, and Masha finds the magic hat that can make her invisible

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] Hot Air/Wheel of Fire/Runaway Horse/Towering Inferno/To Outfox a Fox/Sam's Birthday (S6)
programme.desc: It's a very hot day in Pontypandy and Trevor Evans refuses to accept that his old bus may not make it up the mountain. When the engine overheats, Trevor ignores Norman's advice./Charlie is so busy correcting Gareth's haphazard preparations for the firework display that he misses a Catherine wheel nailed too tightly to the door of Bessie's shed./Sam and the crew arrive at Lizzies Vet Surgery to find that Woolly is stuck on the roof! Meanwhile the Pioneers are off with Trevor, trying to get their map-reading badges./Norman Price, Mandy Flood and the twins play hide and seek, but Norman tries to hide in the fire tower while the firefighters are running a drill. Fireman Sam comes to the rescue./When Tom and Moose volunteer to help Mandy and Norman spot a fox, the animal scampers off with Moose's hat and Tom and Moose end up stuck in a fox hole./Its Sams birthday and Charlie has got Joe to make Sam a remote control model of Jupiter. Unfortunately, Hannah and Sarah decide to play with it and accidentally break it!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: [Series] Three Legged Race/Wild Cheese Chase/Night of the Norman/Norman's Ark/On Thin Ice/Alien Bug Hunt (S7)

Norman Price tries to cheat but then hurts his leg./It's the annual Pontypandy Cheese Roll Challenge and Norman really wants the prize - the giant cheese! /After watching a zombie movie, Norman mistakes the croaky winter bug for a zombie outbreak. /The residents of Pontypandy wake up to find the whole of the town flooded! Fireman Sam and Tom Thomas the helicopter pilot lend a hand where they can./The Fire Service is being put through tests conducted by Chief Fire Officer Boyce. Norman Price decides to put on a magic show, and wants it to be the best magic show ever! /Getting competitive over new game Alien Bug Hunt, Norman, James, Sarah & Mandy take a boat out to sea to find the last Alien Bug but run into trouble when James falls overboard!

Fireman Sam and Tom Thomas the helicopter pilot lend a hand where they can./For the Pontypandy Flower and Vegetable show, Mike is entering a marrow that has been growing on compost. Dilys panics thinking it is a forest fire, and she unwittingly knocks a log from the camp fire./Norman, Mandy, and Radar go out to find a golden eagle, but Norman ignores the danger signs and gets trapped on a crumbling cliff./Sam rescues a cat from a drain. programme.title: Phineas and Ferb
programme.desc: One Good Scare Ought to Do It: Isabella has hiccups, so the boys make their scariest ever haunted house in the back yard, in the hope of curing her of them. S1 E9

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb
programme.desc: A Hard Day's Knight/I, Robot: The family is on holiday in England and holds a medieval tournament. The boys build robots called Phineas and Ferbots, but they soon get out of control. S1 E10

programme.title: Right Now Kapow
programme.desc: Conscience/All You Can Eat: A child weighs her options. A buffet line wages war. S1 E19

programme.title: Right Now Kapow
programme.desc: Company Teamwork/Body Switch: A company learns about teamwork. A snowman wants to live. A dance caller has a strange style. A tiger is for petting. A dad is a body thief. S1 E20

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: Llama Drama: Chase is guarding the team mascot's dingo costume, but their rivals steal it. Chase retaliates by stealing their llama costume but it swallows some nanobots with bad consequences. S2 E16

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: The Haunting of Mission Creek High: Fed up with Trent bullying him, Leo scares him by saying there's a school ghost. Then he finds it may be true - is the school haunted by a former janitor? S2 E9

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: Perry 2.0: Davenport is upgrading the school's technology. Perry persuades him to create a robotic version of herself to control the students. Leo and Chase tinker with it and it goes haywire. S2 E15

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: My Little Brother: Chase inadvertently causes Adam to shrink to get his own back for endless jokes about his size. It's fun until Adam ends up on Perry's burger, and Chase has to rescue him S2 E24

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: Reckoning Ball/Clubbed: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club to cure her of her amnesia. S2 E5

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: Impopstar/Football Camp: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star so exploits the situation for the perks of fame. Remy and Cricket attend football camp to try to impress Remy's Dad. S2 E6

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb
programme.desc: The Summer Belongs To You - Part One: On the longest day of the year the boys plan to travel round the world in one day. Candace is left in charge. Should she bust the boys or join them? S2 E37

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb
programme.desc: Skiddley Whiffers/ Tour de Ferb: The boys make a giant version of Candace's game, Skiddley Whiffers. The boys invite Tour de France winning cyclist Greg LeMond to inspire Baljeet. S3 E11

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb
programme.desc: My Fair Goalie: Ferb's English cousins accuse Ferb of having lost his Britishness. American friends disagree, and the row escalates until the two sides challenge each other to a match. S3 E12

programme.desc: Photo Op/Remy Rescue: Bill tries to trick the family into having a photo taken. Can Cricket stop Remy's parents sending him away to school? S1 E8

programme.title: Lab Rats

programme.desc: Carpet Diem: After a sleepover, Dipper and Mabel decide they can't share a room any more. They find a spare one, which contains an old carpet that it turns out can swap people's bodies. S1 E17

programme.title: Empire Builders
programme.desc: In the 18th century, European powers combed the South Seas, searching out unexplored lands, treasures, and people. British ships, commanded by celebrated navigators, such as Captain James Cook, led the way and sea power facilitated discoveries that would lay the foundations for its empire. The Industrial Revolution occurred in Britain first and the nation exported railways, locomotives, steamships and the telegraph around the globe. British ships, commanded by celebrated navigators, such as Captain James Cook, led the way and sea power facilitated discoveries that would lay the foundations for its empire. The Industrial Revolution occurred in Britain first and the nation exported railways, locomotives, steamships and the telegraph around the globe. Britain's empire was one of conquest and credit, based on money, on violence, and on the ability to employ large numbers of troops to fight

programme.title: Black Sea Mystery: World's Oldest Shipwrecks
programme.desc: Part one of two. In 2015, an international team of scientists began a three-year exploration of the Black Sea in search of evidence of the ancient empires that sailed their ships into unknown waters in pursuit of trade, treasure and conquest. This documentary captures a series of astonishing discoveries that were made - a treasure trove of shipwrecks uniquely preserved that date back up to 2,500 years

programme.title: Empire Builders
programme.desc: In the 18th century, European powers combed the South Seas, searching out unexplored lands, treasures, and people. British ships, commanded by celebrated navigators, such as Captain James Cook, led the way and sea power facilitated discoveries that would lay the foundations for its empire. The Industrial Revolution occurred in Britain first and the nation exported railways, locomotives, steamships and the telegraph around the globe. Britain's empire was one of conquest and credit, based on money, on violence, and on the ability to employ large numbers of troops to fight

Brian begrudgingly takes him, only to get the brush-off from Santa, resulting in Stewie and Brian travelling to the North Pole to find Santa and teach him a lesson. programme.title: Family Guy
programme.sub-title: [TV Drama. Comedy] The Hand That Rocks the Wheelchair (E13)

programme.sub-title: [TV Drama. Comedy] Stan Smith Is Keanu Reeves as Stanny Utah in Point Breakers (E5)

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.sub-title: [TV Drama. Comedy] Kiss Kiss, Cam Cam (E7)
programme.desc: Animated comedy. When Stan buys Francine baseball season tickets for her birthday, she is upset. The situation goes from bad to worse when the couple cannot even manage a proper kiss for the stadium's 'Kiss Cam', so Stan sets out to make things right between them. Meanwhile, Roger resumes the previously discarded persona of Nevada politician Burt Jarvis after his constituents begin to get sick from poisonous drinking water

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.sub-title: [TV Drama. Comedy] And I'm Joyce Kinney (E12)
programme.desc: Subversive animated comedy about the trials and tribulations of American family life. The television story makes Lois look terrible, but Joyce is unapologetic, leaving Lois no choice but to right a wrong

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.sub-title: [TV Drama. Comedy] Friends of Peter G (E13)
programme.desc: Subversive animated comedy about the trials and tribulations of American family life. After a public disturbance, Peter and Brian are forced to attend a 12-step meeting to help kick their drinking problems. Unable to recognise his issue, Peter gets a visit from Death, who gives him a glimpse of what life would be like with and without 'Mr Booze' in his bloodstream

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.sub-title: [TV Drama. Comedy] Hayley Smith, Seal Team Six (E3)
programme.desc: Animated series from the creator of Family Guy about CIA agent Stan Smith. Meanwhile, Steve and his friends buy a slow cooker and try to make the perfect pork

programme.title: American Dad!

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.sub-title: [TV Drama. Comedy] Road to the North Pole (E7)
programme.desc: Subversive animated comedy about the trials and tribulations of American family life. Stewie's favourite thing, after his teddy bear Rupert, is Christmas. When he hears that Santa is making an appearance at the mall, he begs Brian to take him so that he can tell Santa in person what he wants for Christmas. Brian begrudgingly takes him, only to get the brush-off from Santa, resulting in Stewie and Brian travelling to the North Pole to find Santa and teach him a lesson. Once there, they discover the terrible toll Christmas has taken on Santa, who is not well at all, so they resolve to deliver the presents for him, with disastrous results

Brian begrudgingly takes him, only to get the brush-off from Santa, resulting in Stewie and Brian travelling to the North Pole to find Santa and teach him a lesson. Meanwhile, a local talent show brings Peter and Lois back to their folk singing days. Unfortunately, they also revert to their hippie ways and Chris must stage an intervention

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Return to the Griffins' version of that galaxy far, far away as their freakin' sweet saga continues with the final installment of the hilarious three-part Star Wars satire. Following 2005's Family Guy: Blue Harvest and last year's Family Guy: Something, Something, Something Dark Side, the Griffins reprise their intergalactic roles in an outrageous retelling of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi. Guest voices include Anne Hathaway, Rush Limbaugh, Carrie Fisher and many others

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Experts investigate the cause of Crossair Flight 498's crash in 2000. Phone interference was initially suspected, though drugs were later found in the captain's bag

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: The story of the 1978 accident over San Diego, California, in which a PSA flight crashed into a private Cessna, killing all 146 people on board and seven more on the ground

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Documentary investigating the 2011 accident that killed a top-flight Russian ice hockey team. Experts try to determine what caused the fatal crash

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: How the development of U-Boats changed the shape of naval warfare, introducing the world's first stealth weapon and forcing Allied forces to adopt new tactics to fight back

programme.title: Draining the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Documentary investigating the infamous disappearances of ships and aircraft, adopting the rather unorthodox technique of exploring the area's ominous reputation by `draining the water from it' to see what exactly lies below the surface of the mythical triangle. Data from sophisticated sonar surveys enables the ocean floor to be seen, revealing strange geological features. The programme then contemplates whether they have had any influence on the mysterious occurrences that have been documented over the years

programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw count down some of their favourite moments, beginning with a look at some of the craftiest acts of part sourcing

programme.desc: Bluefin fishing is due to shut down in 48 hours due to dropping prices and an oversaturated market, forcing the crews to go to extreme lengths for one last profitable haul

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Dallas Campbell hosts the show that analyses the science behind the fails, including what happens when unloading a truck, multi-tasking and back-flipping on a motorbike. Dallas Campbell

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Discover the science behind misadventures when towing a boat, building a tree swing and attempting a barefoot waterski tumble

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of Tom Lynch and John White, who were captured by the Iraqi secret police and plunged into a world of torture and execution

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Former racing driver Niki Lauda, the founder of Lauda Air, joins forces with investigators looking into the crash of Lauda Air Flight 004 of May 1991. From historic floods and destructive fires to violent earthquakes, they reveal the key moments that led to human catastrophes, and prove that when it comes to chaos, Mother Nature reigns supreme. The programme also suggests that man can learn from past events to minimise their impact if and when they strike again

programme.title: Killer Tornado USA: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Footage of the destruction caused by the 200mph Joplin tornado when it ripped through Missouri in 2011, killing more than 150 people

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of fun-loving hippie Michael Morey, who agreed to smuggle 4kg of cocaine from Ecuador to Madrid

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: How disgruntled former airline employee David Burke managed to smuggle a gun through airport security, causing Pacific Southwest Airlines Flight 1771 to nosedive to the ground in December 1987 after its pilots were shot. All 43 people on board the aircraft died instantly when it hit the ground at the speed of sound

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: The dash cam of a car captures the final moments of TransAsia Flight 235 as it banks steeply to the left, clips an elevated highway, and nosedives into Taipei's Keelung River

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: New & Exclusive. Under the Gun: Officer Nolan and Harper are thrown into a scene of chaos when they escort four young offenders to a correctional facility. (S2, ep 18)

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Butterflied: A victim bearing an uncanny resemblance to Sara piques Grissom's interest and causes him to re-evaluate certain aspects of his own life. (S4, ep 12)

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Body of Water: Melinda must help save the town of Grandview when the unearthing of a grave causes a mass haunting. (S4, ep 13)

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: The Thames Valley Police provide a fascinating insight into car crime and its prevention. Plus, shocking video footage captures dangerous drivers in action. Strong language. (S2, ep 3)

programme.title: Brit Cops: Law & Disorder
programme.desc: Documentary series charting the exploits of the City of London police, charged with safeguarding the Square Mile at the heart of the crime-ridden capital. (S4, ep 10)

programme.title: Nothing To Declare
programme.desc: The observational documentary series goes to the frontline of Australia's defence against customs, quarantine and immigration violations. (S7, ep 1)

programme.title: Nothing To Declare
programme.desc: Cameras join officers from Australia's airports, harbours and mail services as they protect the nation from drug smugglers, illegal products and unusual creepy-crawlies. (S7, ep 2)

programme.title: Nothing To Declare
programme.desc: The officers protecting Australia's borders see some very unusual things. Cameras capture first-hand how they deal with drug-runners, smugglers and strange creepy-crawlies. (S7, ep 3)

programme.title: Nothing To Declare
programme.desc: The fly-on-the-wall documentary joins the men and women who enforce Australia's customs, quarantine and immigration laws at the nation's airports and harbours. (S7, ep 4)

programme.title: The Real A & E
programme.desc: A day at the beach ends in disaster when a day tripper mysteriously collapses, and a rugby player lands himself in hospital with a dislocated shoulder for the third time. (S3, ep 5)

programme.title: The Real A & E
programme.desc: A biker is left struggling to breathe after a crash sends him flying through the air; and what started as a prank ends in disaster for a boy who falls through a garage roof. (S3, ep 6)

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Disrupted: A run-in with community activists leaves Frank feeling suspicious. Erin helps Anthony protect his family from a dangerous psychiatric patient. (S9, ep 11)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Ill-Conceived: The detectives stumble across a complex relationship twist as they hunt for the killer of a factory owner. (S14, ep 10)

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Family Affair: Las Vegas-based forensic drama. When a starlet dies in a car crash, her stalker appears to be the prime suspect. But is there more to the case than meets the eye? (S10, ep 1)

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: Risk Management: Game of Thrones starlet Natalie Dormer stars as Irene Adler, Sherlock's former lover, in a case instigated by a man claiming to be Moriarty. (S1, ep 22)

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Milestones: A guilty Frank tries to reinstate an officer he previously fired. Danny and Baez tackle the murder of a star college basketball player. (S9, ep 12)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Darwinian: The detectives push for a hit-and-run case to become a murder charge when the brutal details of the incident begin to emerge. (S14, ep 11)

programme.title: The Real A & E
programme.desc: A woman has a miraculous escape after being hit by a goods train, and a racehorse trainer loses his nose after being kicked in the face by a horse. (S3, ep 7)

programme.title: The Real A & E
programme.desc: Doctors race to save a motorcyclist's thumb that was ripped off when he collided with a tractor, and a 56-year-old man arrives in A&E in agony with a mystery condition. (S3, ep 8)

programme.title: Customs UK
programme.desc: Customs officers board a suspicious yacht off Cornwall and receive an angry welcome. In Dover, officers searching under a truck find an illegal immigrant hiding on the engine. (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: Customs UK
